aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Tuya 3-gang wall switch**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp`  
   - **Driver:** `switch_3gang`  
   - **Issue:** [#1353](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1353)  
   - **Status:** Open  

2. **TS0041 1-button wireless switch**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_kxaow5ki`  
   - **Issue:** [#1352](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1352)  
   - **Status:** Open  

## Supported Fingerprints
### From Main Repository
- **_TZ3000_mrpevh8p**  
  - **Drivers:** `button_wireless_1`  
- **_TZ3000_xr7itfxq**  
  - **Drivers:** `button_wireless_2`  
- **_TZ3000_zgyzgdua**  
  - **Drivers:** `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`  

### From Forks
- **_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp**  
  - **Drivers:** `switch_3gang`  

## New Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- **_TZ3000_kxaow5ki**  
  - **Status:** New fingerprint found in [#167](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/167)  

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **[PR #10](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/10)**  
   - **Title:** Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User:** Peter-Celica  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **Status:** Closed  

2. **[PR #45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)**  
   - **Title:** Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **Status:** Merged  

3. **[PR #46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)**  
   - **Title:** Adding support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **Status:** Closed  

4. **[PR #1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)**  
   - **Title:** Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202  
   - **User:** chernals  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`  
   - **Status:** Closed  

5. **[PR #1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)**  
   - **Title:** Added TS110E driver  
   - **User:** PiTRiS87  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`  
   - **Status:** Open  

6. **[PR #1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)**  
   - **Title:** Added 3 new devices  
   - **User:** Peter-Celica  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **Status:** Open  

7. **[PR #1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)**  
   - **Title:** Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User:** Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`  
   - **Status:** Open  

8. **[PR #1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)**  
   - **Title:** Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User:** Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`  
   - **Status:** Open  

9. **[PR #1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)**  
   - **Title:** Add `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` - Update app.json  
   - **User:** YuriEstevan  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`  
   - **Status:** Open  

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, highlighting new device requests, supported fingerprints, and relevant pull requests.
